blurb: Large landing modules — the split-video hero with the Orbital wordmark, the elite-agency grid wall, and the brand logo lockup.

components.name: Split video hero
components.blurb: Two-panel landing hero: For Buyers / For Creators panels each with a duotoned looping video, a gradient art fallback layer, a shade, and a white pill label, plus the centered split-color Orbital wordmark.
components.html:
Agency trading desks · brand budgets For Buyers →
Every size of voice · represented For Creators →
ORBITAL

components.name: Agency grid
components.blurb: Elite-agency wall: a 6-column grid mixing a navy STA/BLE logo cell, duotoned face photos, and neon-yellow cells, with the 'A next-gen talent agency' headline overlaid.
components.html:
STA
BLE
A next-gen
talent agency

components.name: Wordmark
components.blurb: The Orbital logo lockup — the neon orbit-ring mark followed by the Orbital wordmark.
components.html:
<button class="logo" aria-label="Orbital">
  <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <ellipse cx="12" cy="12" rx="10.4" ry="3.8" transform="rotate(32 12 12)" stroke="#E6FF00" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <ellipse cx="12" cy="12" rx="10.4" ry="3.8" transform="rotate(-32 12 12)" stroke="#CBD5E1" stroke-width="1.2" opacity=".5"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2.8" fill="#E6FF00"/>
  </svg>
  ORBITAL
</button>
